### R02 config.yaml
```yaml
# PoreGen VAE — default configuration (single source of truth)
#
# Load in notebooks:
#   from poregen.configs.config import load_config
#   cfg = load_config("src/poregen/configs/vae_default.yaml")
#
# Per-run overrides (machine-specific paths, step counts, etc.) should be
# applied in the notebook after loading:
#   cfg["training"]["total_steps"] = 50000
#
# Paths (data_root, run_dir) are intentionally absent — pass them as
# environment variables or notebook-level variables so this file stays
# machine-agnostic and version-control friendly.
#
# Batch-size scaling rules (applied every time bs changes):
#   - total_steps      = ceil(n_train / bs) * n_epochs
#   - kl_warmup_steps  = ceil(n_train / bs) * 2          (2-epoch β ramp)
#   - warmup_steps     = ceil(n_train / bs) * 0.5        (0.5-epoch LR warmup)
#   - lr               = 1e-4 * sqrt(bs / 8)             (sqrt scaling for Adam/AdamW)
#   - lr_min           = lr / 10
#   - all *_every      = original_value / (bs / 8)       (original = bs=8 baseline values)
#   - weight_decay, max_grad_norm, loss weights → unchanged

model:
  name: conv_noattn       # "conv" (bottleneck attention) | "conv_noattn" (pure conv) | "unet" (ablation only)
  z_channels: 8           # latent channels — ablate {4, 8, 16} if <5/8 active after training
  base_channels: 32
  n_blocks: 2             # downsample factor = 2^n_blocks = 4 → 64³ → 16³ latent
  patch_size: 64

loss:
  xct_loss_type: charbonnier  # l1 | mse | charbonnier
  xct_weight: 1.0
  mask_bce_weight: 1.0
  mask_bce_pos_weight: 17.16  # EDA: (1-phi)/phi ≈ 17 (phi_mean=0.055, 1835343 patches)
  mask_dice_weight: 1.0
  use_tversky: true       # EDA: tiny pores (~2 voxels), FN more costly than FP
  tversky_alpha: 0.3
  tversky_beta: 0.7
  kl_free_bits: 0.0       # 0 = disabled; β is fixed at kl_max_beta from step 0
  kl_warmup_steps: 0      # 0 = no warmup; β = kl_max_beta immediately
  kl_max_beta: 0.05       # decided 2026-03-12; see PoreGen Decisions Log

training:
  seed: 42
  lr: 2.0e-4              # flat LR — no warmup, no decay
  weight_decay: 0.01      # AdamW weight decay — does NOT scale with bs (decoupled penalty)
  total_steps: 71690      # 5 epochs @ bs=128 (1835343 train patches / 128 * 5)
  max_grad_norm: null     # null = gradient clipping disabled
  scheduler: none         # cosine | none — none = constant LR
  lr_min: 2.0e-5          # unused when scheduler=none; kept for reference
  warmup_steps: 0         # 0 = no LR warmup
  log_every: 1            # steps between TensorBoard scalar writes  (÷8 from bs=8 baseline)
  eval_every: 62          # steps between validation runs             (÷8 from bs=8 baseline)
  val_batches: 20         # batches per val eval (20 × 128 = 2560 samples)
  test_every: 625         # steps between test-set evaluations        (÷8 from bs=8 baseline)
  test_batches: 20        # batches per test eval
  save_every: 1000        # steps between checkpoint saves            (÷8 from bs=8 baseline)
  image_log_every: 62     # steps between reconstruction image logs   (÷8 from bs=8 baseline)
  sample_every: 12500     # steps between 3-D patch sample saves      (÷8 from bs=8 baseline)
  n_patch_samples: 8      # patches per split (train/val/test) per save

data:
  batch_size: 128
  num_workers: 4
  pin_memory: true
```
